title: Xerox MFP - Dynamic Loadable Module (DLM) Arbitrary Code Execution
description: Xerox multifunction printers accept a 'Dynamic Loadable Module' (DLM) job type via port 9100 using the XRX job header language. By supplying a modified DLM with a crafted job comment containing a shell command, an attacker can execute arbitrary code as root. The DLM signature check is bypassable.
author: Deral Heiland / Pete Arzamendi
